{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231641333EC798B48E35239E012C"}"},"total":140},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7168272957751165709","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么这么快就看完了？太好看了，不知不觉已经看完了，女主武力强大，性格单纯，对家人负责，一家人和睦相处挺好的，就喜欢这种齐心协力奔小康的小说。强大的人不一定要孤僻冷漠，自私自利，其实这样心胸开阔，容得下别人的才是最能体现女主的强大，厉害的人无所畏惧。男主也很好，虽然没有武力值，但是是聪明人，夫妻俩在一起一个有武力值一个有脑力值，最佳拍档，儿女双全又孝顺，公婆慈爱，兄长妯娌和睦，朋友肝胆相照荣辱与共，这就是最好的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668993731,"group_id":"7154598236664106019","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+d8sQ0GR29p6yAa2GTM8xQfMJmylmx/6Qb7XD9k3E+u","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/80e05bb502c0499da8bb0e9252b41aa5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793280&x-signature=i1h%2Bq6YarIs1Kv4baj1ajG9UWWc%3D","user_id":"1081520614543383","user_name":"倚着红楼看美人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1081520614543383","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1738201544,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7154598236664106019","book_info":{"abstract":"女强+种田+空间+基建+宠夫
末世杀了五年丧尸的君澜一醒来，荣获‘南荒流犯’特殊身份，并且还携带病娇腿残+貌美无双小夫君一枚，一对可爱双胞胎，族人若干名，还有原主自带160斤脂肪。
但可怕的是南荒（现代版终身监狱）居民穷凶极恶，有杀人犯，有偷蒙拐骗的奸诈小人，还有能抢一天是一天的土匪。
乱世中，她如何独善其身呢？
于是带领着族人开荒，建房，养鸡鸭养猪，顺便靠绝对蛮力压制流犯，做‘南荒一姐’。
可她那柔弱不能自理的夫君却暗中帮她收服人心，从此南荒焕然一新，新楼房，生机勃勃的田埂，牛羊遍地，她带领全民致富，开作坊，办酒楼，开路造桥，打通南荒商路，从此潇洒肆意走人生。
闲暇时，娇弱夫君总想缠着她再生崽崽。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/67ed8b925b0f290a6867ad72229875f3","author":"袭尔","author_id":"","book_id":"7154598236664106019","book_name":"穿成女将后，她带的奴隶都内卷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#781810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":28,"name":"萌宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=28&name=萌宝&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7154602571150131746","read_count":"318","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"669710"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"638","tags":"种田,古代言情,种田,萌宝,穿越,空间,女强,甜宠,病娇","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7f9342795f6002196688e6bf8d99f020~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439293&x-signature=fZ7E%2F9VZUAkSV6pNIW6snaoJXBk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat
